text: The declaration that I will be here for the rest of my life hangs heavily in the air. In the first image, the sterile, orderly conference room and the solemn isolation of the glass seem almost like a metaphor for an unchanging fate—the kind of eternity that feels more like a sentence than a blessing. Shifting to the second image, the wall of research and development inspires hope—a reminder that growth and innovation are possible even in spaces that feel confining. I feel a tension here, between resignation and the promise of new ideas; I am at once trapped and called to envision something different, something more.
